text:
Mad Scientist's Pheromones マッド博士のフェロモン剤 - is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and so is required for a player to complete the game. 
__NOTOC__

|align=center colspan="3"|Spray on your body to attract the opposite sex. However, you cannot adjust the strength of its effect, so be careful as it may cause a proliferation of stalkers.

Summary

Mad Scientist's Pheromones マッド博士のフェロモン剤 - This card allows the caster to conjure a vial of Mad Scientist's Pheromones. When applied to the body, it attracts people of the opposite sex. The strength of this potion can not be altered, so as a result it may cause a proliferation of stalkers. Should be used with caution.

Card Description

{| border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE"
![Jap]
|No.071 :: マッド博士のフェロモン剤 
体に吹き掛けると異性にとてもモテるようになる。ただし効き目をセーブできないので、ストーカーの大量発生など問題も多い。注意が必要。
|-
![Eng]
|No.071 :: Mad Scientist's Pheromones 
Become very popular to the opposite sex when you have sprayed this over your body. As the strength can't be altered, outbreaks of stalkers often. Care must be taken.
|}
